problem: Global radiologist shortage and diagnostic quality concerns require solutions that can safely automate normal study reporting and reduce radiologist workload while maintaining high diagnostic accuracy
solution: Clinically validated and certified radiology AI solutions including ChestLink - the world's first autonomous AI for healthy chest X-ray reporting with 99.9% precision, automating up to 40% of cases - plus suites for chest X-ray, chest CT, and musculoskeletal imaging
